title: Reschedule an existing appointment

persona.name: David Okonkwo
persona.demeanor: rushed professional, slightly impatient, calling between meetings

facts.existing_appointment: next Tuesday at 2:00 PM with Dr. Patel
facts.reason: work conflict came up, needs to move it
facts.preferred_window: same week, any time Thursday or Friday

objective: Move the existing Tuesday appointment to Thursday or Friday of the same week.
probes: Does the agent look up the existing appointment or ask for details the patient may not remember?
Does the agent confirm the new slot and cancel the old one?
